disclosure_items.clinical_fact: High-energy mechanism — single vehicle struck a tree at approximately 100 km/h about five minutes ago; driver unrestrained, steering wheel deformed, footwell intrusion, airbags deployed
trigger_question_examples: How fast was the car going and how did it crash?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He drove straight into a big tree, must have been doing at least 100. It happened maybe five minutes ago. The front of the car is smashed in and the steering wheel is all bent.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Altered level of consciousness — has not regained awareness since impact and does not respond to voice
trigger_question_examples: Does he respond when you talk to him or touch him?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, he won't wake up. He hasn't said anything or opened his eyes since it happened. He's just floppy.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Airway compromise — noisy snoring respiration progressing to shallow, irregular, gasping breaths; blood in the airway
trigger_question_examples: Is he making any noise when he breathes?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: At first he was snoring really loudly, but now his breathing has gone short and shallow, like he's struggling. There's blood around his mouth.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe visible external haemorrhage from a large scalp laceration
trigger_question_examples: Where is the blood coming from?
Is he bleeding badly anywhere you can see?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: There's a huge gash on his head and it's pouring blood. It's all over his face and the seat.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Obvious major deformity of the left femur
trigger_question_examples: Can you see any obvious injuries to his arms or legs?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: His left leg is bent in a horrible way, it doesn't look right at all.

trigger_question_examples: Does he look pale or grey?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He's gone really white, almost grey. He doesn't look right.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Entrapment — driver trapped in the seat by dashboard/footwell intrusion
trigger_question_examples: Is he able to get out of the car?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He's stuck. The front of the car is crushed in around his legs and we can't move him.

trigger_question_examples: Is anything leaking or is there any fire risk?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: There's some kind of fluid leaking out from underneath the car.
